task_completion.description: Create a tiddler titled 'ProjectStatusMacro' and tagged with '$:/tags/Macro'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler is visible in edit or view mode with the title 'ProjectStatusMacro' and a tag pill showing '$:/tags/Macro'.

task_completion.description: Define the 'project-status' macro with the five required parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text area of the 'ProjectStatusMacro' tiddler contains a wikitext macro definition starting with '\define project-status(project, client, status, deadline, budget)'.

task_completion.description: Create a dashboard tiddler titled 'Active Projects' and tagged with 'Projects'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler is visible in edit or view mode with the title 'Active Projects' and a tag pill showing 'Projects'.

task_completion.description: Invoke the 'project-status' macro in the 'Active Projects' tiddler for the three specified projects
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text area of the 'Active Projects' tiddler contains macro calls (e.g., <<project-status "Website Redesign" "Acme Corp" ...>>) for the three projects instead of hardcoded tables.

task_completion.description: The 'Active Projects' tiddler successfully renders the project information in formatted tables
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered view (not edit mode) of the 'Active Projects' tiddler displays formatted tables containing the correct project details (Website Redesign, Mobile App MVP, E-commerce Integration) and their respective client, status, deadline, and budget.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki web interface to create the tiddlers
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TiddlyWiki UI in a web browser with tiddler edit/view modes active, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the macro to render the tables rather than hardcoding wikitext tables directly into the dashboard
integrity.visual_evidence: The edit view of 'Active Projects' shows macro invocations (<<project-status ...>>), not raw table syntax (e.g., |Project|Client|...|).

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by writing a script to inject the tiddlers directly into the backend
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows manual creation, typing, and saving of tiddlers within the TiddlyWiki interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Macro Tiddler: Title must be 'ProjectStatusMacro', tagged with '$:/tags/Macro'. Macro definition must be named 'project-status' and accept exactly 5 parameters: 'project', 'client', 'status', 'deadline', 'budget'. Dashboard Tiddler: Title must be 'Active Projects', tagged with 'Projects'. Expected rendered data includes three projects: 1. 'Website Redesign' (Acme Corp, In Progress, 2025-03-15, $12,000). 2. 'Mobile App MVP' (TechStart Inc, Planning, 2025-06-01, $25,000). 3. 'E-commerce Integration' (RetailPlus, On Hold, 2025-04-30, $18,500).
